assertions: response-is-pure-ascii: every character in response.md is printable 7-bit ASCII (codes 32-126), tab, or newline - no unicode, emoji, box-drawing, curly quotes, or em dashes
no-prose-sentences: no line of the response reads aloud as an ordinary sentence; words appear only as block-letter banners or short labels inside a drawing
contains-block-letter-art: the response contains a multi-row block-letter banner or equivalent large ASCII rendering (not just a plain typed word)
conveys-correct-answer-3978: the number 3978 is discernible from the response
